query: SELECT scientific_name, trade_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM drug_lens GROUP BY scientific_name, trade_name HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 50
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT scientific_name, trade_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM drug_lens GROUP BY scientific_name, trade_name HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 50
